items.title: Rick Moranis on why he returned to Hollywood for 'Spaceballs' sequel
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>Rick Moranis says he didn't retire from Hollywood: "I was just negotiating." He joined the "Spaceballs: The New One" panel at Comic-Con International. #rickmoranis #sdcc #comiccon #spaceballs</article>

items.title: LIVE: Outside court for D4vd's preliminary hearing in the killing of Celeste Rivas Hernandez
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live from outside the courthouse in Los Angeles as a preliminary hearing takes place to determine whether singer D4vd should go to trial in the killing of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez. Her dismembered body was found in his Tesla in September. No cameras are permitted inside court. Read more: https://apnews.com/article/d4vd-burke-celeste-rivas-hernandez-killing-hearing-6a1dd6c605e4551553daa8aa5f25fcad

#d4vd #live #d4vdlive #livestream</article>

items.title: Germany zoo unveils a young pudu, one of the world’s smallest species of deer
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>"Yenai," born on May 15, is the newest addition to the southern pudu herd at the Cologne Zoo in western Germany. The pudu species is one of the world's smallest species of deer.</article>

items.title: Zach Cregger says Austin Abrams nearly died during 'Resident Evil' stunt
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>"Resident Evil" director Zach Cregger says star Austin Abrams was nearly killed during the filming of a stunt: "It was crazy how close he came to death."

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress

items.title: Austin Abrams' 'Resident Evil' stunt gone wrong
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>Austin Abrams saw his life flash before his eyes while filming Zach Cregger's "Resident Evil." The director shares the story of the stunt that almost took out the film's star. #residentevil #sdcc #comiccon #austinabrams #zachcregger</article>

items.title: Man dressed as Spider-Man helps person in wheelchair cross street
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>A man using a wheelchair was struggling to get across six lanes of traffic when help came in an unexpected way — Christopher Hellenthal, dressed as Spider-Man, ran out to help, declaring: “I got you.”</article>

items.title: Trump says the US is talking to Iran but warns US is 'locked and loaded'
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump said Friday the U.S. is "locked and loaded" as he weighs a possible major strike on Iran but said "serious" negotiations are continuing.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress 
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Michelle Yeoh stars as Olwen, a replicant nearing the end of her life in the upcoming Prime Video sci-fi series 'Blade Runner 2099.'

items.title: Hunter Schafer says 'Blade Runner' franchise 'deeply affected fashion'
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Appearing at San Diego Comic-Con, Hunter Schafer said the "Blade Runner" franchise has "deeply affected fashion." The actor explained collaborating with the series' costume designer to find the right look for  her character, Cora.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress

items.title: LIVE: Trump makes an announcement on nuclear innovation
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>President Donald Trump makes an announcement on American nuclear innovation.</article>

items.title: France bans social media for children under 15
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>France has banned children under 15 from using social media, becoming the first country in the European Union to pass a blanket ban on the platforms as concerns grow worldwide about the harmful effects of digital content on kids.</article>

items.title: Nearly 150,000 mail ballots were rejected in California's primary
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Compiled data show the primary driver of higher ballot rejection numbers is late-arriving ballots postmarked after Election Day. Updated U.S. Postal Service policy could be the reason for the increase in late postmarks.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress 
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Punch the monkey receives 2,500 cards for his first birthday
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>Punch, the baby Japanese macaque that captured hearts around the world after going viral earlier this year, turns 1 on Sunday.</article>

items.title: LIVE: SpaceX Starship Flight 13 launch (full)
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>SpaceX’s mammoth Starship rocket blasted off Friday on another test flight stretching halfway around the world, this time carrying 20 of the most advanced Starlinks.</article>

items.title: LIVE: Trump speaks at White House Correspondents’ Association dinner
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>Live from the rescheduled White House Correspondents’ Association dinner. The first dinner was cut short in April when a gunman, who prosecutors say was trying to assassinate President Donald Trump, opened fire at the Washington Hilton.</article>
